hero.title: Global Government GenAI Observatory
hero.subtitle: Documenting and studying the use of generative AI across public institutions worldwide.
hero.description: G3O builds a versioned, open-source panel of institution-level observations that make public-sector GenAI use visible, comparable, and auditable at scale.

overview.title: What is G3O?
overview.track: Tracks public-sector GenAI adoption across ~700,000 institutions globally
overview.document: Documents evidence, tools, vendors, safeguards, and governance practices
overview.support: Supports cumulative research and evidence-based policy

contribute.title: Help Build the Observatory
contribute.subtitle: G3O is a collaborative effort. We rely on researchers, practitioners, and the public to help us build the most comprehensive picture of government GenAI use.

footer.tagline: Building a global panel of government generative AI use.
footer.affiliations: A project by researchers at Stanford University, Northwestern University, and the University of Rochester.
